articles.title: The Lenovo Legion Go S is RAMageddon’s latest victim
articles.description: You can still find the Asus Xbox Ally X and the MSI Claw 8 AI Plus for $999 and $1,049 respectively, but Lenovo's Legion Go S has seemingly given up the fight. The best version of Lenovo's 8-inch handheld now costs nearly double what it did at launch - originally $829.99 last summer, the SteamOS […]
articles.author: Sean Hollister

articles.title: John Ternus is taking over from Tim Cook as Apple's CEO
articles.description: The multitrillion-dollar home of the iPhone, Mac, and so many other tech gadgets is getting a new leader this fall, as Apple has announced that Tim Cook will be replaced as CEO on September 1st by current hardware boss John Ternus. How will we look back on Cook's legacy, and what will Apple look like […]
articles.author: Richard Lawler

articles.title: Read Tim Cook's letter to the Apple world as he departs as CEO
articles.description: Apple CEO Tim Cook has written a letter to the community as he prepares to step down from his role in September. "This is not goodbye. But at this moment of transition, I wanted to take the opportunity to say thank you," Cook writes. As part of the shift, John Ternus, Apple's senior vice president […]
articles.author: Emma Roth

articles.title: Apple names Johny Srouji as chief hardware officer
articles.description: Apple has appointed Johny Srouji as its new chief hardware officer, "effective immediately," according to an announcement on Monday. He is stepping into the shoes of current hardware engineering head John Ternus, who will replace Tim Cook as CEO in September, while Cook becomes the chairman of the board. Last December, Srouji reassured his team […]
articles.author: Emma Roth

articles.title: Apple CEO Tim Cook is stepping down
articles.description: Apple CEO Tim Cook is stepping down and will be succeeded by John Ternus, currently Apple's senior vice president of hardware engineering. Ternus will take over as CEO and join Apple's board of directors on September 1st, 2026. Cook, who joined Apple in 1998 and took over as CEO from Steve Jobs in 2011, will […]
articles.author: Jay Peters

articles.title: Here's how Amazon's price fixing allegedly drove up prices everywhere
articles.description: On Monday, California Attorney General Rob Bonta revealed the evidence of alleged price-fixing by Amazon. The state filed a request to the Supreme Court in February for a preliminary injunction to stop Amazon's behavior while the lawsuit it originally filed in 2022 proceeds, and is now making that 16-page document available, "largely unredacted." It lays […]
articles.author: Richard Lawler

articles.title: Silicon Valley has forgotten what normal people want
articles.description: One of the most mortifying things about knowing a lot of techies is listening to them tell me excitedly about some very important discovery that they believe they have made. Recently, I ran into an acquaintance of mine, who began talking my ear off about an amazing discovery he'd made with LLMs. Knowledge, it turns […]
articles.author: Elizabeth Lopatto

articles.title: WhatsApp tests 'Plus' subscription that adds stickers and more for a few bucks a month
articles.description: WhatsApp users are getting some new customization features - for a price. According to WABetaInfo, Meta is rolling out a WhatsApp Plus subscription to "a limited number of users," offering several cosmetic and quality of life perks, including exclusive stickers, different app themes, custom app icons, premium ringtones, the ability to pin up to 20 […]
articles.author: Stevie Bonifield
